pay.title: Complete your payment
pay.step1: Go to {mercuryo}, click on the "BTC" button and choose USDC BASE.
pay.step2: Then type {amount}, the amount you owe, in the "You get" USDC box.
pay.step3: When prompted for the USDC BASE wallet address, paste the one below:
pay.step4: You must select "I don't need Boost Points". Otherwise, you will be charged a fee.
pay.copy_success: ✅ Copied! Paste it in the wallet address field to pay.
pay.success_msg: You can close this tab now.
pay.expired_msg: This payment session is no longer active. Please start a new one.
pay.notfound_msg: This link is invalid or has expired.
pay.close_hint_msg: Return to the previous tab to continue with checkout.
